_comment: Phase 274 / STATS-05 -- Traditional Chinese translations for new SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_* trans-units. Brand 'FSB' and 'MCP' kept verbatim per DO-NOT-TRANSLATE.md. Placeholders preserved byte-for-byte.
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_SECTION_HEADING: <x id="START_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="<span [attr.translate]="'no'">"/>FSB<x id="CLOSE_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="</span>"/> 遙測
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_SECTION_SUB: 即時顯示 <x id="START_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="<span [attr.translate]="'no'">"/>FSB<x id="CLOSE_TAG_SPAN" ctype="x-span" equiv-text="</span>"/> 安裝的匿名使用情況。每 5 分鐘更新一次。
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_ACTIVE_NOW_LEGE: 活躍用戶（5 分鐘視窗）
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_AGENTS_RUNNING_: 活躍代理（10 分鐘視窗）
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_AVG_AGENTS: 每位活躍用戶的平均代理數
SHOWCASE_STATS_FSB_CHART_AVG_AGENTS_LEGE: 每位活躍用戶的平均活躍代理數
